name: Oriental Pork Tenderloin Packets
recipeIngredient: 4 sheets Reynolds Wrap Heavy Duty Aluminum Foil (18x24 inches each)
1 pound pork tenderloin, cut into 1/4 slices
1 red bell pepper, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat grill to high.
2. Center one-fourth of the pork, broccoli, water chestnuts, carrots, red pepper, and onions on each foil sheet.
3. Sprinkle each evenly with soy sauce, sesame oil, and ginger.
4. Wrap and seal each packet tightly, leaving space for heat circulation inside.
5. Grill packets 14 to 16 minutes on high in a covered grill.
6. Serve with cooked rice.
